user_story: As an Employee, I want to add a new out time request, so that I can formally request time away during working hours
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Out Time Request screen; When I click Add new request and submit the details; Then a new out time request is created and listed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my out time requests by a period From and To date, so that I can find requests within a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Out Time Request screen; When I set a Period From and To date and click Search; Then only requests within that range are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my requests by Status, so that I can focus on Pending, Approved, Taken, Rejected or Cancelled requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Out Time Request screen; When I select a Status such as Pending approval and click Search; Then only requests with that status are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view details of each out time request, so that I can track its type, dates, duration and status
acceptance_criteria: Given out time requests exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Request type, From date time, To date time, Number of days, Number of hours and Status

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset my search filters, so that I can clear the period and status selections
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then the Period and Status filters are cleared

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the out time request list, so that I can see the latest approval status of my requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Out Time Request screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with the current request statuses
